info.title: CRM2 API
info.description: Generated from the live Express app (ADR-0031, B-11). Phase 1 = surface contract (paths/methods/tags/security). Request/response schemas land in phase 2 (zod single source). Do not edit by hand — run `pnpm openapi`.
